Fix: 

Add to local/include/ffmpeg/avformat.h:
	#define INT64_C
	#define __STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS
	#include <stdint.h>

This a is very ugly, temporary hack just to make it compile.
How-To-Repeat: Set "FFMPEG" (Enable FFMPEG support), then `make`
